g.text: Main runtime spine: task layer -> controller core -> sim actuation -> MuJoCo -> observation -> state feedback
Shared core reused by sim/run_floating_base.py and run_robot.py; trot path = gait phase -> stance/swing foot trajectory -> IK.
Sim swaps joystick/hardware adapters for task scheduler + MuJoCo interfaces; run_robot.py swaps in JoystickInterface + IMU + HardwareInterface.
